arts.ttl: William Saliba insists he is happy at Arsenal and determined to do 'big things' at the Emirates amid interest from Real Madrid
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: William Saliba insisted he is happy at Arsenal amid reports linking him to Real Madrid and aims to become the world's best defender by winning major trophies.

arts.ttl: William Saliba CONFIRMS Real Madrid transfer plan
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba has confirmed that he plans to snub transfer interest from Real Madrid in order to continue his stay at the Emirates Stadium. Despite Real Madrid’s continued interest, Saliba believes that his form has been below par so far this season.

arts.ttl: WIlliam Saliba comments on Arsenal contract situation amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: William Saliba has commented on his contract situation at Arsenal after being linked with a move to Real Madrid. The France international has been the backbone of the Gunners’ stingy defence in recent years, helping them keep the best defensive record in the Premier League last season, something they are on track to repeat this […] The post WIlliam Saliba comments on Arsenal contract situation amid Real Madrid links first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans take aim at Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. ahead of Benfica clash

arts.ttl: Tchouaméni downplays boos by Real Madrid fans and turns attention to Atletico
arts.sum: The France midfielder has being doing his best to turn the cheers into applause after a tough stretch and has been playing well going into Madrid’s decisive Champions League match against city rival Atletico Madrid on Wednesday. With central defenders Raúl Asencio and Antonio Rüdiger set to start, Tchouaméni is expected to play as a midfielder again on Wednesday, when Atletico is likely to come out attacking at home.

arts.ttl: Man City 'add Real Madrid star to list of summer transfer targets' - as Pep Guardiola prepares for squad overhaul
arts.sum: The restructuring already began in January via the additions of Omar Marmoush, Vitor Reis, Nico Gonzalez and Abdukodir Khusanov.
